description: France's leading drug information provider offering medication databases, therapeutic recommendations, and clinical decision support tools for healthcare professionals and patients.
business_model: B2B - Subscriptions to hospitals, pharmacies, clinics; B2C for patient information
target_market: French healthcare professionals (doctors, pharmacists, nurses) and patients
competitive_advantage: 100+ years of trust, official reference in France, comprehensive drug database

varden_fit.rationale: Essential infrastructure for French market - potential data partner for medication safety
